name: MITRE.LIN.T1203.RULE Exploitation for Client Execution
notes:
No action required
Get more Linux MITRE rules: https://www.scnsoft.com/services/security/siem/linux-mitre-attack-rules
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
when the source is vulnerable to any exploit on any port
TD_list: APPLY MITRE.LIN.T1203.RULE Exploitation for Client Execution on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
AND when the source is vulnerable to any exploit on any port
RED_list: Event name: MITRE.LIN.T1203.RULE Exploitation for Client Execution

Event description: Adversaries can take advantage of certain vulnerabilities through targeted exploitation for the purpose of arbitrary code execution.
See more on: https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1203
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
Include detected events by "Source IP" from this point forward, in the offense, for 0 second(s)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
